Name: destroy
HelpText: Destroys an item from your inventory.

Name: drop
HelpText:
[cmd] drops an object, or some coins, on the ground.
[cmd] understand the object names 'ALL' for all objects and
'ALL.object' for all objects with the same name.
[cmd] X.sword is also allowed to drop the Xth sword of the list.

Name: east
HelpText: Use this command to walk in east direction.

Name: equipment
HelpText: [cmd] lists your equipment (armor, weapons, and held items).

Name: flee
HelpText:
Once you start a fight, you can't just walk away from it.  If the fight
is not going well, you can attempt to [cmd], or another character can
RESCUE you.  (You can also RECALL, but this is less likely to work,
and costs more experience points, then fleeing).

If you lose your link during a fight, then your character will keep
fighting, and will attempt to RECALL from time to time.  Your chances
of making the recall are reduced, and you will lose much more experience.

Name: get
HelpText:
[cmd] gets an object, either lying on the ground, or from a container, or even
from a corpse. TAKE is a synonym for get.
[cmd] understand the object names 'ALL' for all objects and
'ALL.object' for all objects with the same name.
[cmd] X.sword is also allowed to get the Xth sword of the list.

Name: give
HelpText:
[cmd] gives an object, or some coins, to another character.
[cmd] X.sword is also allowed to give the Xth sword of the list.

Name: inventory
HelpText: [cmd] lists your inventory.

Name: kill
HelpText:
[cmd] is used to kill mobiles (monsters) you see all over the world.
To kill other players, you have to use MURDER.

Name: look
HelpText: [cmd] looks at something and sees what you can see.

Name: mstat
HelpText: Display information about a character (player or mobile)

Name: north
HelpText: Use this command to walk in north direction.

Name: put
HelpText:
[cmd] puts an object into a container.
[cmd] understand the object names 'ALL' for all objects and
'ALL.object' for all objects with the same name.
[cmd] X.sword is also allowed to put the Xth sword of the list.

Name: remove
HelpText:
[cmd] will take any object from your equipment and put it back into your
inventory.

Name: sacrifice
HelpText:
[cmd] offers an object to your god, who may reward you.
The nature of the reward depends upon the type of object.

Name: say
HelpText: [cmd] sends a message to all awake players/mobs in your room (In Character channel).

Name: score
HelpText:
[cmd] shows much more detailed statistics to you only. Your ability scores
are shown as true value(current value), so for example
Str: 23/15 means you have a 15 strength from training, but a 23 strength
from other factors (skills, spells or items).

Name: south
HelpText: Use this command to walk in south direction.

Name: tell
HelpText: [cmd] sends a message to one player anywhere in the world.

Name: wear
HelpText:
[cmd] will take an armor from inventory and start using it
as equipment.
[cmd] ALL will attempt to HOLD, WEAR, or WIELD each suitable item in your
inventory.
[cmd] ALL.object will attempt to HOLD, WEAR or WIELD each suitable item
in your inventory with the same name

Name: west
HelpText: Use this command to walk in west direction.
